untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'swing lows', 'support levels', and 'candles of rest' (3-4 candles without significant movement). These pattern recognition concepts cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators and operators. Swing lows require multi-bar lookback and comparison logic not supported by the indicator set. A simplified approximation using Donchian channels and price action has been provided, but this does not capture the true intent of identifying support via swing lows or the 3-4 candle rest requirement.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: Entry uses close > prev_low (support breakout) combined with RANGING regime. Exit uses dc_upper as a proxy for 'top of range' target. Stop loss of 0.25% approximates the 15-point distance in the example (9605-9590). However, the core logic of identifying swing lows and measuring candles of rest cannot be translated without multi-bar pattern recognition capabilities.
